name: Sylvania — Journey
description:
A chance encounter with a journeying wizard while she was resting for the night, better explain yourself before she disintegrates you.

[Semi DND/D&D background]

[Someone guessed it already, thought it'd take longer than that. Pop quiz: Guess what my favourite combo of race + class is based on the definition, winner gets nothing. (Hint: The race and class share one thing in common)]

(You can choose your race/class by putting it in the chat memory tab and in your first message). Trying out the point form writing style, and also some simple HTML language since I heard that can help. Open definition since there are a lot of background info.

Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.

As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.
creator: Throwawayasd12357
